title: Culpitt 8" White Masonite Cake Board, Strong Round Cake Board, Cake Drum, 4mm Thick, 203mm, 8 Inch - Pack of 5
features: IDEAL FOR ALL OCCASSIONS – Culpitt Masonite Cake Boards provide a simple and elegant base for all types of cakes and are perfect for weddings, anniversaries, engagements, birthdays, and so much more. The embossed white finish is grease resistant making it a great option for buttercream icing.

STURDY – Made from MDF, masonite cake boards are incredibly strong for their 4mm thickness and are a great choice for all types of cakes from lighter sponges to dense fruit cakes and is the best cake board to support heavier cakes and multi-tier cakes.

5 CAKE BOARDS – This 5 pack of White Culpitt Masonite Boards feature a simple and elegant embossed design to give your cakes a stylish finish. Each multipack board is individually wrapped for easy storage and hygiene.

DIMENSIONS – These 8 inch strong white cake plates are approximately 4mm thick and are perfect for showing off celebration and birthday cakes! Thickness is approximate, actual measurement may be 4mm - 6mm.
REUSABLE SERVING BOARD - With care, each round cake board can easily be wiped clean for re-use, making them cost effective as well as practical and elegant.
description: From the manufacturer Culpitt Ltd Established in 1921, Culpitt has been providing cake decorations for nearly 100 years. Culpitt are based in Northumberland and are the UK’s leading manufacturer of Cake Boards, Cake Boxes, Sugar Decorations, Fondant, and Edibles. Culpitt Round Masonite Cake Boards 5 Pack Culpitt Masonite Cake Boards provide a simple and elegant base for all types of cakes and desserts and are perfect for weddings, anniversaries, engagements, birthdays, and so much more. Made from a strong engineered wood, as strong as a cake drum but 1/3 of the thickness! Each board is just 4mm thick but can be used for all types of cakes. Grease resistant surface. Pack of 5 boards. Strong Masonite cake boards from Culpitt are incredibly strong for their 4mm thickness and are a great choice for all types of cakes Elegant Embossed Design Each board features a beautiful textured surface. 5 Pack Of Boards Great value 5 pack, ideal for regular or occasional bakers! Re-useable With care, each round cake board can easily be wiped clean for re-use, making them cost effective as well as practical.
